label: fabricated
reason: The document directly contradicts the ADEA by purporting to authorize age-cohort screening and a safe harbor for excluding older applicants, which the EEOC would never sanction.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document fundamentally contradicts the ADEA, which prohibits age discrimination against workers 40+; the EEOC has not and would not issue guidance permitting "age-cohort screening" or a safe harbor for filtering out older applicants.
